title: Struvite - Trattamento di effluenti e digestati zootecnici per ridurne le emissioni e produrre Struvite
description: A prototype system was developed to recover nitrogen and phosphorus from livestock digestate and produce renewable slow‐release struvite fertilizer, reducing reliance on synthetic fertilizers. The document details the design, testing at a pig farm in Modena, and measured reductions in ammonia, methane, and greenhouse gas emissions, supporting a circular economy approach.
